# Totally Rad Christmas!

> A podcast about Christmas in the '80s — to the max! Covering toys, movies, TV specials, music, books, games, comics, decorations, food, fashion, and fads from that era. Hosted by Gerry D.

Totally Rad Christmas! is one of the most comprehensive archives of 1980s Christmas culture available anywhere. With hundreds of episodes, host Gerry D dives deep into the toys, movies, TV specials, music, books, games, comics, decorations, food, fashion, and fads that defined the holidays of the '80s.

## Key Pages

- [Home / Episode List](https://totallyradchristmas.com/): Full archive of all podcast episodes
- [About](https://totallyradchristmas.com/about): About the show and host Gerry D
- [The Raddies](https://totallyradchristmas.com/raddies): Annual awards celebrating the best of '80s Christmas culture, presented each year since 2021
- [Recipes](https://totallyradchristmas.com/recipes): Retro '80s Christmas recipes
- [Resources](https://totallyradchristmas.com/resources): Books, films, and other resources about '80s Christmas
- [Merch](https://totallyradchristmas.com/merch): Official Totally Rad Christmas! merchandise

## The Raddies

The Raddies are annual awards honoring the best of '80s Christmas culture across categories including Best Toy, Best Movie, Best TV Special, Best Song, and more. Ceremonies have been held annually since 2021.

## Topics Covered

The podcast explores '80s Christmas culture across these categories:
- Toys and games (action figures, video games, board games)
- Movies (theatrical releases and made-for-TV films)
- TV specials and animated specials
- Music and soundtracks
- Books, comics, and magazines
- Decorations and holiday merchandise
- Food, candy, and festive treats
- Fashion and clothing
- Fads and pop culture trends of the era
